positive: Minimalist geometric pattern of stylized woodland creatures (deer, fox, owl) integrated with abstract celestial elements (crescent moon, stars, constellations). The overall composition should be a highly detailed, single-color silhouette graphic against a clean background. Use a sophisticated color palette of deep indigo, earthy moss green, and muted terracotta accents. The style should be inspired by Art Deco naturalism and modern Scandinavian design, emphasizing clean lines, perfect symmetry, and strong negative space. Focus on a centralized, repeating pattern that looks excellent on t-shirts, mugs, and tote bags. High contrast, crisp linework, vector graphic quality, solid black silhouette outline with subtle spot color fills, perfect print resolution.
negative: photorealistic, messy, complex background, watercolor, gradient, noisy, low detail, blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor quality
